_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work closely with planners, analysts, and collection managers to identify intelligence gaps and ensure intelligence requirements are accurate and up-to-date.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-014 (DG, cosine: 0.514), RM-T-001 (RM, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.621). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [accurate, analysts, closely, collection, date, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.884, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Work closely with planners, analysts, and collection managers to identify intell" and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 < STS 0.621 (gap -0.093). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [accurate, analysts, closely] and [acquisition, ai, analysis] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.4%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [accurate, analysts, closely, collection, date, ensure]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current].
